notes: backchannel-observe for mistral-vibe. Vibe renders a TUI-only tool-permission dialog (approval_app Textual widget, an in-memory asyncio.Future never written to messages.jsonl) — exactly the transcript-invisible waiting state read-back (issue #732) targets. The read-back path (reader.CaptureScreen → DetectUI → TerminalObserver → SessionDetector) is agent-agnostic but gated on control consent: TerminalObserver.observe returns unless consent.Granted(adapter, ControlPermissionKey) (terminal_observer.go:111). Vibe's agent.go declares NO Control/control permission, so the gate can never open; additionally DetectUI's markers are Claude-Code-specific and don't cover vibe's 'Permission for the … tool' phrasing. daemon=bug (both feasible fixes: declare Control{SupportsInput} like kiro-cli/aider + add vibe markers), consistent with the backchannel-control feasible-Control-declaration verdict. KNOWN-FAILING: the spec below asserts the CORRECT waiting arc; the recording is expected to show the session stay working (write-gap) while the dialog is held, never waiting. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), birth anchored to start unpinned. Observations: model=mistral-medium-3.5 (live config.active_model), tokens observable (sidecar context_tokens), cost NOT (vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity).

text: session_<...> session born in ready when the transcript directory appears (single-birth; id from the transcript directory)
vibe PID bound to the session (matched by cwd)

CORRECT/known-failing: while the TUI-only 'Permission for the <tool> tool' approval dialog is on screen, terminal read-back surfaces it as waiting — independent of any agent hook. Fails for vibe because no control permission is declared (read-back gate shut) and DetectUI lacks vibe's markers.
CORRECT/known-failing: user answers the dialog and the agent resumes → leaves waiting, back to working, reclassifying from the transcript as usual
Turn completes after approval → ready; turn_done carries Tokens.Total>0
